expectations.text: Uses the HuggingFace URL directly as the source field (no file upload needed)
expectations.evidence: Does not use a source field at all; uses adapter.model_id or --adapter-id without a direct HF URL as the source field
Uses POST https://api.studio.nebius.ai/v1/deployments (wrong base URL and wrong endpoint path)
"base_model": "meta-llama/Meta-Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct" in the curl REST API example
No polling loop shown; only UI/CLI/curl create steps with no status-checking code
